title: Birks Vanilla
description: A lightweight modpack that improves performance and fixes
body:
**This modpack focuses on optimizing Minecraft's performance and fixing common issues to provide smoother gameplay, while keeping the modpack lightweight.**

**Optimization** Includes mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others to increase performance

**Bug Fixes** Uses Debugify to fix common bugs

**Visuals** Uses Continuity to get connected glass and Particle Interactions for improved visuals.

**Customizable HUD** Uses MiniHUD

Thanks to all the mod and shader developers
